skills.description: The 3D Web Experience skill focuses on bringing the third dimension to web applications, balancing visual impact with performance, and ensuring accessibility for users. It includes capabilities like Three.js implementation, React Three Fiber, WebGL optimization, and interactive 3D scenes.

Audit and fix animation performance issues including layout thrashing, compositor properties, scroll-linked motion, and blur effects. Use when animations stutter, transitions jank, or reviewing CSS/JS animation performance.
anti_triggers: migrating animation libraries unless explicitly requested
animating layout continuously on large or meaningful surfaces
